title: hypericum quadrangulum subsp. obtusiusculum
intro: Hypericum quadrangulum subsp. obtusiusculum is a subspecies of the St. John's Wort plant, native to parts of Europe, specifically found in the mountainous regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to promote health benefits such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving mood, and providing relief from insomnia. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Hypericum quadrangulum subsp. obtusiusculum are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
